description.value:
Requirements Your target is larger than you.

You cling to a target with a sticky grasp. Attempt an @Check[athletics|against:fortitude] check against the target's Fortitude DC.

Critical Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded] until the end of your next turn, unless you move or your target Escapes. If the target moves, you move with them.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] until the end of your next turn, unless you move or your target Escapes. If the target moves, you move with them.

Failure You miss the target.

Critical Failure You miss the target and land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone].
